title: Sokkupodi Potaale Lyrics MUK Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Baba Seghal, Shruthi Haasan.
Song: Sokkupodi

Lyrics: Thamarai
MOvie:  Muppozhudhum Un Karpanaigal
Music: GV Prakash Kumar
Sobana kannaala..

Oh Sokkupodi potaale, emmanasil sobana kannaale
naan mayangi saayiren thannaale, hey unnaale
Oh Sokkupodi potaaye, emmanasil sobana kannaala
naan mayangi saayvadhu un tholaa, yei kannaala

Palasellaam pudhusaaga therivadhu sariya thappa
Manasellaam podiyaagi udhiridhu manalaai ippo

Oh.. mothamaaga mothamaaga mutham tharren
oththukoyen oththukoyen
Adhukenna adhukenna, thalli ninnu
ennikoyen ennikoyen ... (oh sokkupadi...)

Drive you crazy.. sexy sexy ..
Drive you crazy.. sexy sexy ..
[rap..]

Hey Nethu raathiri kanda soppanam
innik kaalayila marandhe pochu
Thandha muthangal mattum niyabagap porullaache...

Indha raathiri andha muththatha
thandhu poga nee varuven naane
Kanna moodiye, kannam kaatiye padupeney..

Medhandha padagu, odanja moolgu
kadanja alugu, neendhi paarpomey ...

Kandukaama kandukaama
kaatru vandhu allipoga alli poga
Thalli poga thalli poga
aasai illai katikichu kattikichu
Hey hey .. be tight.. hey hey.. take me now..

Hey ekkachakkama enna vachi nee
seiyyum karpanai podhum podhum
aana podhilum melum kaetkave manasu aengum

Sonna paathikke sokki poriye
meedhi ulladha sonnaa theendha
enna vittu nee odi pogave vazhi kaetpa

Mudinja thorathu, kilicha sirichu
udhattaal valachu, meedham sollvaayo

Oh.. mothamaaga mothamaaga mutham tharren
oththukoyen oththukoyen
Adhukenna adhukenna, thalli ninnu
ennikoyen ennikoyen ...

Oh Sokkupodi potaale, emmanasil sobana kannaale
naan mayangi saayiren thannaale, hey unnaale

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Sokkupodi Potaale expresses themes of love and playful romance, highlighting the joy of being infatuated.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Muppozhudhum Un Karpanaigal, the song showcases a light-hearted moment between the lead characters, emphasizing their chemistry.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Baba Sehgal and Shruti Haasan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Sokkupodi Potaale was composed by GV PrakashKumar.

When was the song released?

The song was released on December 17, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sokkupodi Potaale, the lively duet by Baba Sehgal and Shruti Haasan brings forth a playful and romantic vibe. The song captures the excitement of young love, as the characters express their feelings in a fun and energetic manner. Set against the backdrop of Muppozhudhum Un Karpanaigal, it evokes a sense of joy and celebration. The catchy beats and engaging lyrics make it a perfect anthem for parties and celebrations.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sokkupodi Potaale is a vibrant and energetic track that perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance. Featuring the unique collaboration of Baba Sehgal and Shruti Haasan, this song from the movie Muppozhudhum Un Karpanaigal is sure to get you dancing. With its catchy beats and playful lyrics, it’s a celebration of love and joy that resonates with listeners.
stanzaMeanings: Oh Sokkupodi, in my mind, with beautiful eyes, I am getting lost because of you, Oh Sokkupodi, in my mind, with beautiful eyes, I am getting lost because of your touch, oh beautiful eyes.
Everything is new and feels right or wrong. The mind is confused and is now a bride.
Oh.. I give you kisses, I hold you tight. What does it matter, what does it matter, I push you away, I push you away... (oh sokkupadi...)
Drive you crazy.. sexy sexy .. Drive you crazy.. sexy sexy ..
Hey, last night I saw a dream, today it has vanished. Only the gifts given are remembered...
Tonight, you will come and take away that gift, I will close my eyes, and show you my eyes..
With a broken heart, running away, looking at the past, we will see...
Searching and searching, the wind comes and blows away, let it go, let it go, there is no desire left, it has been tied up.
Hey hey .. be tight.. hey hey.. take me now..
Hey, with a twist, you create dreams, enough is enough, but even in the dreams, the heart still longs.
If you say it, will you really go away? If I say it, will you run away?
Without finishing, laughing and teasing, will you say it?
Oh.. I give you kisses, I hold you tight. What does it matter, what does it matter, I push you away, I push you away...
Oh Sokkupodi, in my mind, with beautiful eyes, I am getting lost because of you, Oh Sokkupodi, in my mind, with beautiful eyes, I am getting lost because of your touch, oh beautiful eyes.
Everything is new and feels right or wrong. The mind is confused and is now a bride.
Oh.. I give you kisses, I hold you tight. What does it matter, what does it matter, I push you away, I push you away...
